disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus in Focus I: what we know and what it means - World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.body_en: Hantavirus in Focus I: what we know and what it means World Health Organization (WHO)

updates.body_en: Hantavirus Death Confirmed in Colorado as Health Officials Launch Investigation People.com
updates.summary_zh: 科罗拉多州确认汉坦病毒死亡病例，卫生官员展开调查。

updates.body_en: Fact Check: WHO advice on hantavirus time lag based on established science, not new narrative Reuters
updates.summary_zh: 路透社事实核查：WHO关于汉坦病毒时间滞后的建议基于科学。

updates.title_en: Argentina's icy outpost at the end of the world fears the hantavirus will chill tourism - WLRN
updates.body_en: Argentina's icy outpost at the end of the world fears the hantavirus will chill tourism WLRN
updates.summary_zh: 阿根廷偏远地区担忧汉坦病毒影响旅游业。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus-Hit Cruise Ship Will Sail Again In June (Latest Updates) - Forbes
updates.body_en: Hantavirus-Hit Cruise Ship Will Sail Again In June (Latest Updates) Forbes
updates.summary_zh: 受汉坦病毒影响的邮轮将于六月复航。

updates.title_en: A critical window to stop hantavirus is opening. Not all countries are managing exposed travelers the same way - CNN
updates.body_en: A critical window to stop hantavirus is opening. Not all countries are managing exposed travelers the same way CNN
updates.summary_zh: CNN报道各国对汉坦病毒暴露旅行者管理方式不同。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Kills Colorado Man With Severe Symptoms: What Happens When This Rodent-Borne Virus Enters The Hu - News18
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Kills Colorado Man With Severe Symptoms: What Happens When This Rodent-Borne Virus Enters The Hu News18
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒致美国科罗拉多州一名男子死亡，症状严重。

updates.summary_zh: 流行病学家更新埃博拉国际紧急状态、汉坦病毒、蜱虫等。

updates.title_en: After Hantavirus, Ebola outbreak makes WHO concerned as spread remains uncertain - Deccan Herald
updates.body_en: After Hantavirus, Ebola outbreak makes WHO concerned as spread remains uncertain Deccan Herald
updates.summary_zh: WHO对埃博拉疫情表示担忧，传播仍不确定。

updates.title_en: Dutch authorities expect more cruise ship outbreaks as hantavirus-hit vessel docks - France 24
updates.body_en: Dutch authorities expect more cruise ship outbreaks as hantavirus-hit vessel docks France 24
updates.summary_zh: 荷兰当局预计更多邮轮爆发汉坦病毒，受染船只已靠港。

updates.title_en: ‘Don’t wait for proof’ – scientists call for tougher Hantavirus rules - AirQualityNews
updates.body_en: ‘Don’t wait for proof’ – scientists call for tougher Hantavirus rules AirQualityNews
updates.summary_zh: 科学家呼吁加强汉坦病毒防控，不要等待确凿证据。

updates.title_en: UK bolsters hantavirus response with Japanese supply of experimental antiviral drug - Telegraph India
updates.body_en: UK bolsters hantavirus response with Japanese supply of experimental antiviral drug Telegraph India
updates.summary_zh: 英国从日本获得实验性抗病毒药物，加强汉坦病毒应对。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Hunt: Argentine Scientists Set First Traps - NDTV
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Hunt: Argentine Scientists Set First Traps NDTV
updates.summary_zh: 阿根廷科学家首次设置陷阱，开展汉坦病毒宿主调查。

updates.title_en: Argentina launches rodent hunt after deadly hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship - Firstpost
updates.body_en: Argentina launches rodent hunt after deadly hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship Firstpost
updates.summary_zh: 阿根廷在邮轮致命汉坦病毒爆发后启动啮齿动物捕杀。

updates.body_en: Douglas County adult dies from hantavirus, health officials say there’s no link to cruise ship outbreak Colorado Public Radio Colorado adult dies from hantavirus after local rodent exposure USA Today Hantavirus-Hit Cruise Ship Will Sail Again In June (Latest Updates) Forbes
